name: reactjs-multiplat-template
description: Template for a ReactJS app configured to run on Android, iOS, and multiple desktop operating systems.

scripts.react:test: echo No testing implemented yet, but use Vitest when we start doing that! Vite + Vitest = good times!
scripts.electron:build:linux:snap: echo Not Yet Implemented! Need more config for command: electron-builder --linux snap --publish never
scripts.electron:build:linux:rpm: echo Not Yet Implemented! Need more config for command: electron-builder --linux rpm --publish never
scripts.electron:build:linux:flatpak: echo Not Yet Implemented! Need more config for command: electron-builder --linux flatpak --publish never
scripts.electron:build:linux:pacman: echo Not Yet Implemented! Need more config for command: electron-builder --linux pacman --publish never
scripts.electron:build:linux:alpine: echo Not Yet Implemented! Need more config for command: electron-builder --linux apk --publish never
scripts.electron:build:macos:dmg: echo Not Yet Implemented! Need more config for command: electron-builder --mac dmg --publish never
scripts.electron:build:macos:pkg: echo Not Yet Implemented! Need more config for command: electron-builder --mac pkg --publish never
scripts.electron:build:macos:mas: echo Not Yet Implemented! Need more config for command: electron-builder --mac mas --publish never
scripts.capacitor:android:compile: npm run react:build && npx cap sync
scripts.capacitor:android:prepare: npm run capacitor:android:prepare:assets && npm run capacitor:android:compile
scripts.capacitor:android:run: npm run capacitor:android:prepare && npx cap run android
scripts.capacitor:android:build: npm run capacitor:android:prepare && npx cap build android
